title: Manilkara hexandra
intro: Manilkara hexandra, also known as the False Ash Tree, is a medicinal plant species native to tropical Africa. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Manilkara hexandra include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Manilkara hexandra is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders.
